classification.cautionReason: Conciliar or creedal material received in mainstream Nicene Christian tradition, with denominational differences on some canons.

lineage: The Canons of the Councils of Ancyra, Gangra, Neocæsarea, Antioch and Laodicea, which Canons were Accepted and Received by the Ecumenical Synods.
The Canons of the Holy Fathers Assembled at Gangra, Which Were Set Forth After the Council of Nice.

metadata.author: The Canons of the Councils of Ancyra, Gangra, Neocæsarea, Antioch and Laodicea, which Canons were Accepted and Received by the Ecumenical Synods

title: Canon XV.

verses.book: The Canons of the Holy Fathers Assembled at Gangra, Which Were Set Forth After the Council of Nice.
verses.text: If anyone shall forsake his own children and shall not nurture them, nor so far as in him lies, rear them in becoming piety, but shall neglect them, under pretence of asceticism, let him be anathema.

verses.book: The Canons of the Holy Fathers Assembled at Gangra, Which Were Set Forth After the Council of Nice.
The Canons of the Holy Fathers Assembled at Gangra, Which Were Set Forth After the Council of Nice.
verses.text: Whosoever they be that desert their children and do not instruct them in the fear of God let them be anathema.

verses.book: The Canons of the Holy Fathers Assembled at Gangra, Which Were Set Forth After the Council of Nice.
verses.text: The fathers of this Synod here teach that it is the office and duty of parents to provide for the bodily care of their children, and also, as far as in them lies, to mould them to the practice of piety.

verses.book: The Canons of the Holy Fathers Assembled at Gangra, Which Were Set Forth After the Council of Nice.
verses.text: And this care for their children is to be preferred by parents to any private exercises of religion.

verses.book: The Canons of the Holy Fathers Assembled at Gangra, Which Were Set Forth After the Council of Nice.
verses.text: In this connexion should be read the letter of St. Francis de Sales.

verses.book: The Canons of the Holy Fathers Assembled at Gangra, Which Were Set Forth After the Council of Nice.
The Canons of the Holy Fathers Assembled at Gangra, Which Were Set Forth After the Council of Nice.
verses.text: It may perhaps be noted that this canon has not infrequently been violated by those who are accepted as Saints in the Church.

verses.book: The Canons of the Holy Fathers Assembled at Gangra, Which Were Set Forth After the Council of Nice.
verses.text: This canon is found, in Isidore’s version, in the Corpus Juris Canonici, Gratian’s Decretum, Pars I., Dist. xxx., c. xiv.
